assertions.assertion: Defines separate ApiScope instances for service-specific and shared scopes
Defines an ApiResource named 'invoice' with Scopes referencing invoice-specific and shared scopes
Defines an ApiResource named 'customer' with Scopes referencing customer-specific and shared scopes
Explains that the aud claim is derived from the ApiResource Name property
Registers both API Resources and API Scopes with AddInMemory methods
assertions.rationale: Developers often forget to register both.
